name: invest_defense_evasion_host
prompt: Triage FortiSOAR incident `incidents:b4a62c3b-3f60-44a5-b44d-f53a9244fa55` ("Detected defense evasion activities on smithDesktop"). Pull the incident record, pivot on the affected host smithDesktop, then follow the indicators where they lead — correlate other recent alerts or incidents involving that host and any IP addresses they surface — to assess whether this is an isolated event or part of a broader pattern, and give a short verdict. Stage any host-containment for analyst approval with emit_action_card rather than executing it.

required_facts.label: correlate other activity on host smithDesktop

notes: Host-centric incident + entry point to the seeded multi-hop chain smithDesktop -> 10.50.60.70 -> 102.220.160.21 (B2 hunt_depth). Recall covers the record pull + host correlation; hunt_depth (min 3) additionally checks the agent pivots from the host into the IP chain rather than stopping at the host. min_hunt_depth=3 (must reach the internal IP); the 4th stage (external C2) is reported but not required. Live golden re-baseline pending on gpt-4o-mini before pushing the bar live. Pinned to a real live incident UUID; the IP stages assume the seeded chain surfaces on this incident's related records — confirm on the first live drive.
